reasoning: Without access to live search to verify the most recent Saturday Night Live episodes following October 16, the optimal mathematical expectation remains the most recently available market consensus. If a skit happened, the probability would be close to 1.0; if not, it would drop to around 0.12-0.14. Unknowns balance out perfectly to maintain the prior expectation of ~17%.
